column1: # This file provides known download locations for common Illumina array manifests.
# NOTE: Illumina has retired the webdata.illumina.com direct download URLs.
# Manifest files for current arrays must now be downloaded from the Illumina
# The URLs below point to the Illumina Support product file download pages.
# After registering at support.illumina.com, download the BPM, EGT, and CSV
# files from the relevant product page, then provide the local file paths
# to the pipeline using --bpm, --egt, and --csv options.
# For programmatic downloads, use --bpm-url, --egt-url, --csv-url with the
# direct download URLs obtained after authentication.
